name: io.github.philpof102-svg/toshi
description: A floating terminal companion (GPL-3.0). Answers questions about the repo you're in — grounded in a code graph via codebase-memory-mcp, never invented. Tools: toshi_ask / toshi_status / toshi_mood / toshi_watch.

runtimeArguments.description: the MCP bin exposed by the package
path to the stdio MCP entry inside the repo
